name: Data Safety
rules: JSONL processing logs are append-only - never UPDATE or DELETE log records
Activity log records in SQLite are append-only audit trail - never modify or delete
SQLite must run in WAL mode for concurrent read safety
All file writes (logs, journals) must be fsynced for durability
Journal files in processing/.journal are immutable during active processing
Config is immutable after startup - never modify config.json at runtime
Daily log rotation archives are gzipped and never modified after creation
Inventory transactions are append-only ledger entries - adjustments create new records
Database backups run daily at 00:15 UTC - never skip or disable without explicit approval
Rejection sidecars (.meta.json) are write-once - never overwrite existing rejection metadata
